rationale: #2223 was closed 2026-04-29 as fixed; #2234 reports the same caret drift in 1.6.1, suggesting incomplete fix or reoccurrence rather than a distinct duplicate.

candidate_title: Consider implementing an alternative to selectize.js
rationale: Both issues request replacing shiny's selectize.js dependency; #4227 (filed June 2025) explicitly mentions Tom Select as one candidate, covering the same ground as #4330 (filed December 2025) which focuses specifically on Tom Select.
